Who the apps you’re auditing belong to. Picks the default surface area — power-user controls v
For me
— you’re auditing your own apps and you’ll act on what you find. Default: full surface,
For someone I care about
— you’re checking apps for another adult who’ll make their own call. Default: share/expo
For a child or dependant
— you’re responsible for someone else’s device. Default: simpler surface — keyboard shor
What you want out of the app. Pick more than one if you like — except “just the basics”,

. Each purpose is a shortcut that sets the audience and goals below for you; choose

— surfaces risk classification, profile-mismatch badges, and delete shortcuts. Low-severity apps col
